=== POLLER SCRIPT TARGET HANDLING ===
#!/bin/bash
# claude-poller.sh v2.1
# Compatibility, HTTP validation, JSON validation, timeout, and atomic-state fixes.

set -u

REPO="itechguy2011/homelab-bridge"
BRANCH="main"
PAT_FILE="/home/jose/.secrets/github_bridge_pat"
LOCK="/tmp/bridge-poller.lock"
LAST_ID_FILE="/home/jose/.poller_last_id"
LOG_FILE="/home/jose/claude-poller.log"
POLL_INTERVAL=8
CMD_TIMEOUT=55

log() {
  local message="[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] $*"
  echo "$message"
  echo "$message" >> "$LOG_FILE"
}

load_pat() {
  if [ ! -s "$PAT_FILE" ]; then
    log "ERROR: GitHub credential file missing or empty"
    return 1
  fi

  PAT=$(cat "$PAT_FILE")
  [ -n "$PAT" ]
}

api_get() {
  local path="$1"
  local destination="$2"
  local http_code

  http_code=$(curl -sS \
    --connect-timeout 10 \
    --max-time 30 \
    --retry 2 \
    --retry-delay 2 \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $PAT" \
    -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
    -o "$destination" \
    -w '%{http_code}' \
    "https://api.github.com/repos/$REPO/contents/$path?ref=$BRANCH") || {
      log "WARN: GitHub request failed for $path"
      return 1
    }

  if [ "$http_code" != "200" ]; then
    log "WARN: GitHub returned HTTP $http_code for $path"
    return 1
  fi
}

get_json() {
  local path="$1"
  local response
  response=$(mktemp)
=== BRIDGE-EXEC-ENV: FULL SCRIPT ===
#!/bin/bash
# bridge-exec-env.sh: reads VM and BCMD from environment variables
# Called by n8n SSH node with: VM=xxx BCMD=yyy /home/jose/bin/bridge-exec-env.sh

get_ip() {
  case "$1" in
    vm-claude-hub)    echo "127.0.0.1" ;;
    vm-ecosystem)     echo "192.168.0.203" ;;
    vm-memory)        echo "192.168.0.205" ;;
    vm-openclaw)      echo "192.168.0.199" ;;
    vm-hermes)        echo "192.168.0.202" ;;
    vm-mcp-services)  echo "192.168.0.204" ;;
    vm-dashboard)     echo "192.168.0.206" ;;
    vm-journal)       echo "192.168.0.207" ;;
    vm-identity)      echo "192.168.0.208" ;;
    vm-relationship)  echo "192.168.0.209" ;;
    *)                echo "" ;;
  esac
}

IP=$(get_ip "$VM")
if [ -z "$IP" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: Unknown VM: $VM"
  exit 1
fi

if [ "$VM" = "vm-claude-hub" ]; then
  eval "$BCMD" 2>&1
else
  B64=$(printf "%s" "$BCMD" | base64 -w0)
  ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@"$IP" "echo $B64 | base64 -d | bash" 2>&1
fi
